name: Phase 32: Stateless HTTP
description: Add external session store interface with Redis adapter pattern, session token extraction, stateless gateway routing, and serialization formats for horizontal scaling.
completion: External session store interface exists, token extraction works, gateway routes statelessly, serialization round-trips correctly.

tasks.description: Define ExternalSessionStore interface in session/store_external.go extending SessionStore with Connect, Close, Ping methods. Implement RedisSessionStore stub (interface only, no Redis dependency) with configuration struct.
Implement session token extraction middleware in session/token.go. Support Bearer token, cookie, and custom header extraction strategies. Configurable via TokenExtractor interface.
Add stateless request routing to gateway/. Use session token to determine upstream affinity without local session state. Support consistent hashing for session distribution.
Implement session serialization in session/serialize.go. Support JSON and gob encoding. Benchmark both formats for size and speed.
Add session store health check to health/ package. ExternalSessionStore.Ping integration with health checker registry.
Write tests for all new code: token extraction strategies, stateless routing, serialization round-trips, health checks. Target 90%+ coverage on new code.
